# Revenue Bench

> Specialized recruitment for the revenue engine. Revenue Bench finds, assesses, places, and coaches sales talent that performs: sellers, sales leaders, enablement, and RevOps. Not just resumes that interview well.

Revenue Bench is a founder-led sales recruitment firm launched in 2026 by Carlos Garrido and Steve Swanston. Every placement is assessed with the Objective Management Group (OMG) sales-specific assessment, arrives with a training refresher, gets a dedicated onboarding coach for the first 90 days, and is backed by a 90-day replacement guarantee. The firm serves high-growth and private-equity-backed companies, and maintains a pre-vetted "bench" of revenue talent so clients can hire without building their own pipeline.

Founder track record (stated separately, never combined): Carlos Garrido has supported $3B+ in client revenue growth and $6B+ in client exits across 30 years in sales and sales leadership. Steve Swanston brings $500M+ in exits and an OMG Certified Partner pedigree. Revenue Bench is a sister firm to Performance Edge, Swanston Growth Advisors, and Best Sales Team Training.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://revenuebench.io/): What Revenue Bench does, and why operators, not recruiters, find revenue.
- [For Employers](https://revenuebench.io/for-employers): How companies hire revenue talent that performs, with OMG assessment, a training refresher, a 90-day onboarding coach, and a replacement guarantee.
- [How It Works](https://revenuebench.io/how-it-works): The six-step search. Define the role, source from the bench, assess with OMG, present a true shortlist, place and train, then coach for 90 days.
- [Private Equity](https://revenuebench.io/private-equity): Recruiting and ramping the sellers and sales leaders a value-creation plan assumes, across a portfolio.
- [For Candidates](https://revenuebench.io/for-candidates): How revenue professionals get on the bench, assessed objectively, placed into system-led teams, and coached through their first 90 days. No cost to candidates.
- [About](https://revenuebench.io/about): The founders and the operator ecosystem behind every search.
- [Contact](https://revenuebench.io/contact): Tell us about the role you are filling, or that you want on the bench. A founder replies within one business day.

## Insights and guides

- [Why Sales Hires Fail: What 2.4 Million Assessments Show](https://revenuebench.io/guides/why-sales-hires-fail): Original analysis by co-founder Steve Swanston, a Certified Partner of Objective Management Group. Five failure patterns across the largest sales-specific dataset, the numbers behind each, and how to hire against them.
- [How to Evaluate a Sales Recruitment Agency](https://revenuebench.io/guides/how-to-evaluate-a-sales-recruitment-agency): An eight-criteria scorecard for vetting any sales recruiter: assessment method, written guarantee terms, specialization, who does the work, fee clarity. Honest about when Revenue Bench is not the fit.
- [The True Cost of a Bad Sales Hire](https://revenuebench.io/guides/cost-of-a-bad-sales-hire): Why a mis-hire costs $200,000 to $250,000, and how to cut the risk before and after you hire.
- [The 6% Problem](https://revenuebench.io/guides/the-6-percent-problem): What the largest database of assessed salespeople shows. Only 6% are elite and half are weak.
- [How to Assess a Salesperson Beyond the Resume](https://revenuebench.io/guides/how-to-assess-a-salesperson): The four traits that predict performance, and how to measure them objectively.
- [How to Hire a VP of Sales or Sales Manager](https://revenuebench.io/guides/how-to-hire-a-vp-of-sales): Why not to default to your top seller, the four red flags, and the 30/60/90-day scorecard.
- [The 90-Day Onboarding Plan That Reaches Quota](https://revenuebench.io/guides/90-day-sales-onboarding-plan): The cadence and coaching that turns a new hire into a quota carrier by day 90.
- [Building a Sales Talent Bench](https://revenuebench.io/guides/building-a-sales-talent-bench): How to source revenue talent before you need it.
- [Sales Compensation Benchmarks for 2026](https://revenuebench.io/guides/sales-compensation-benchmarks-2026): OTE by role, base and variable mix, quota, and accelerators.
- [When to Use a Sales Recruitment Partner vs In-House](https://revenuebench.io/guides/sales-recruiter-vs-in-house): Which roles justify a specialist, and how one earns its fee.
- [All Insights](https://revenuebench.io/guides): The full guide library.
